name: Chuck Grassley
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,310,549 for Chuck Grassley in U.S. Senate, IA. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,310,549.
